title: timotocia mansoi
side_effects: Timotocia mansoi can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to respiratory problems, skin irritation, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Timotocia mansoi may cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Additionally, misuse can also lead to gastrointestinal complications, such as diarrhea, abdominal pain, and vomiting.
